TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_O_satapangan_to_pipariri’_to_waco, title = O_satapangan_to_pipariri’_to_waco, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/O_satapangan_to_pipariri’_to_waco} }

S.FORM: O satapangan to pipariri' to waco Mikingkiw to satapangan no pinanowang no kalofinacadan no Yincomin i Taywan, hay matongal ko fana' ita to harateng no liteng no Yincomin itiya ho to pikimad naira to pisatapang no pinanowang, ato samaanay ko pi'adop itiya ho, samaanay ko pipariri' to pinanowang. Ona satapangan no pinanowang mapahapinang ko pipariri' no tamdaw to pinanowang, saka o tamdaw hananay kalimelaaw to kinaira no serayan, ano ca kahatira ko pinangan, wa tatiih kita. O satapangan no waco no Yincomin no Taywan, itira I Farangaw ira kora sowal, o nani Nasaasay ko waco, tayni i Taywan i , alaan no Piwma ko cecay noya waco a mipakonglin, hacafay a mi'adop. Itiya ho iraay ko amekang nani Farangaw tahira i Sanayasay. Ira koya ci Loapuy hananay a tamdaw, toloay ko nihakelongan nira a waco tayni i Farangaw a mi'adop. Mari'ari'angay koya waco, miharatengay ko tamdamdaw toya waco tatolo. To cecay a romi'ad, alaan no Piwma ko lima polo' a nikimoloan a faes, pakaenen nira koya waco. Makaen noya waco koya faes i, malingae ko ngoyos caay to kanga'ay a mingatowa'. Oya ci Takopis hananay a tamdaw i, tahepo han nira ko cecay noya waco, alaen nira panokay i Piwma a mipariri' a pakonglin. O satapangan no mi'adopay a waco no Paliwan i, malecaday to pikitoh no Farangaw. Kaorira i, mahapinangay ko pikitoh naira to rayray no pikonglin to waco. Itiya ho , awaay ko mipariri'ay to waco saan. O liteng no Mutasukusu i, ira koya ci Pavurogan-zeikon hananay a tamdaw. To cecay a romi'ad, koyoden nira ko pana', sicafay to sasepat a kapah talatokos a mi'adop. Itiya ma'araw naira ko cecay ira ko kohcalay ira ko kohetingay a fanoh a pinanowang, mafana'ay a milepel to pinanowang a milaop. Sapicepetaw kona lalima a tamdaw tona waco, hay pakonglinen i, hacafay a mi'adop. Kaorira i, samaamaanen i, cowa pakacepet ko mira tona waco. Ikor to i, maharateng naira ko cecay sakicepet toya waco a demak. Palamlamen naira ko fokes no fafahiyan to otong a misanga' to nisatinpolaan, hasapanono'en naira kowa waneng toya waco. Sasoelin sa masakaniw koya tatolo a waco, makafit no fokes ko wadis naira, valu han to ko ngangan nora waco. Nanoya mapariri' to ko waco malosapi'adop no tamdaw. O pipariri' no Tayan, Co, Saysiya to waco i, o nialaan i tokos ko waco naira. O satapangan no pipariri' no Tayan i, sowal sa, itiya ho itiraay i tokos ko aro' no waco, ma'araw ho naira ko tamdaw i, miaw^aw to a mikakarat to tamdaw, katalawan nanay! Yo cecay a romi'ad, ira koya kapah tatosa, pahahanay I kaeno no kilang, cowa kafana' koya tawinaan a waco, liyasan nira ko totoy nira a miklim to kakaenen. Itiya alacecay han noya tatosaay a kapah koya totoy, onini ko sakasatapang no tamdaw a mipariri' to waco. Lomahad ko waco, kalawidang han naira ko tamdaw, fana' sato to caciyaw no tamdaw, roma sato mataneng haca ca mira, kaorira maliyangay anca, mansa maketer ko tamdaw. Mafana'ay ko mira a milawla to tamaw, ano citama' ko tamdaw minokay I, ano ca ka adihay ko tama' I, ki'ayawen nira ko mi'adopay a minokay pakitoh to loma'ay, adihayay ko tama' niyam han nira ko loma'ay, halikien a mihamham ko mi'adopay han nira ko tamdaw a milawla. Mapoyi' to ko tamdaw I, waho saan milalekal to keter a sapiketonaw to sema noya waco. Itiya satapang ko waco caay to kafana' a caciyaw, mitengil to to sowal no tamdaw. O kitoh no Saysiya to waco , o kaketon no waco ato tamdaw. Itiya ho ira koya tamdaw sapipatayaw to waco, sowal sa ko waco, "Patayen iso ako, o maan to ko sapi'adop iso a waco? Ano i kakakaka aca ko taneng no tamdaw to waco i, kaorira, ano milakec to 'alo, anca comikay, matooray namo kami saw?" Pakosoelinan koya tamdaw to sowal no waco, saka cowa kapatayen nira koya waco, tahidang han nira ko widang a mipahakelong to waco a mi'adop, tangsol a sitama' ca mira, sonisoni matama' haca na mira ko tolo a siri. Ya loma'ay no mi'adopay I, hemek sa to kakadofah naira to tama' a minokay, licay sa, cima no namo ko idahiyay a mi'adop? O waco saan ko tamdaw a pacako, nanoya olah sato ko tamdaw a mipariri' to waco. O no Ponong a kongko to waco i, itiya ho o tamdaw ko waco saan, oya maodangay a malikakaay maseti' no 'aomanay, ikor to i, malawacoay kona malikakaay. Itiya ho, mapolong ko pinaro no loma' talaomah a maomah. Ca ho laheci ko tayal i, minokay kami misakalafi sa koya malikakay a tatosa. Pisakalafian to i, minokay to ko maomahay, tahaloma' i, ma'araw kona malikakaay maodang a mala'alip. Itiya keter sa ko loma'ay a mipapekpek to miranan a tatosa, saka lawaco sato ca mira.
S.PHON: o~u satapaŋan to~u pipaririʡ to~u waʦo~u mikiŋkiw to~u satapaŋan no~u pinano~uwaŋ no~u kaɾo~ufinaʦaɬ~ɮan no~u jinʦo~umin i tajwan, ħaj mato~uŋaɾ ko~u fanaʡ ita to~u ħaratəŋ no~u ɾitəŋ no~u jinʦo~umin itija ħo~u to~u pikimaɬ~ɮ naira to~u pisatapaŋ no~u pinano~uwaŋ, ato~u samaanaj ko~u piʡaɬ~ɮo~up itija ħo~u, samaanaj ko~u pipaririʡ to~u pinano~uwaŋ. o~una satapaŋan no~u pinano~uwaŋ mapaħapinaŋ ko~u pipaririʡ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw to~u pinano~uwaŋ, saka o~u tamɬ~ɮaw ħananaj kaɾiməɾaaw to~u kinaira no~u sərajan, ano~u ʦa kaħatira ko~u pinaŋan, wa tatiiħ kita. o~u satapaŋan no~u waʦo~u no~u jinʦo~umin no~u tajwan, itira i faraŋaw ira ko~ura so~uwaɾ, o~u nani nasaasaj ko~u waʦo~u, tajni i tajwan i , aɾaan no~u piwma ko~u ʦəʦaj no~uja waʦo~u a mipako~uŋɾin, ħaʦafaj a miʡaɬ~ɮo~up. itija ħo~u iraaj ko~u aməkaŋ nani faraŋaw taħira i sanajasaj. ira ko~uja ʦi ɾo~uapo~u~uj ħananaj a tamɬ~ɮaw, to~uɾo~uaj ko~u niħakəɾo~uŋan nira a waʦo~u tajni i faraŋaw a miʡaɬ~ɮo~up. mariʡariʡaŋaj ko~uja waʦo~u, miħaratəŋaj ko~u tamɬ~ɮamɬ~ɮaw to~uja waʦo~u tato~uɾo~u. to~u ʦəʦaj a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, aɾaan no~u piwma ko~u ɾima po~uɾo~uʡ a nikimo~uɾo~uan a faəs, pakaənən nira ko~uja waʦo~u. makaən no~uja waʦo~u ko~uja faəs i, maɾiŋaə ko~u ŋo~ujo~us ʦaaj to~u kaŋaʡaj a miŋato~uwaʡ. o~uja ʦi tako~upis ħananaj a tamɬ~ɮaw i, taħəpo~u ħan nira ko~u ʦəʦaj no~uja waʦo~u, aɾaən nira pano~ukaj i piwma a mipaririʡ a pako~uŋɾin. o~u satapaŋan no~u miʡaɬ~ɮo~upaj a waʦo~u no~u paɾiwan i, maɾəʦaɬ~ɮaj to~u pikito~uħ no~u faraŋaw. kao~urira i, maħapinaŋaj ko~u pikito~uħ naira to~u rajraj no~u piko~uŋɾin to~u waʦo~u. itija ħo~u , awaaj ko~u mipaririʡaj to~u waʦo~u saan. o~u ɾitəŋ no~u mo~u~utaso~u~uko~u~uso~u~u i, ira ko~uja ʦi pab~vo~u~uro~u*an-*əiko~un ħananaj a tamɬ~ɮaw. to~u ʦəʦaj a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, ko~ujo~uɬ~ɮən nira ko~u panaʡ, siʦafaj to~u sasəpat a kapaħ taɾato~uko~us a miʡaɬ~ɮo~up. itija maʡaraw naira ko~u ʦəʦaj ira ko~u ko~uħʦaɾaj ira ko~u ko~uħətiŋaj a fano~uħ a pinano~uwaŋ, mafanaʡaj a miɾəpəɾ to~u pinano~uwaŋ a miɾao~up. sapiʦəpətaw ko~una ɾaɾima a tamɬ~ɮaw to~una waʦo~u, ħaj pako~uŋɾinən i, ħaʦafaj a miʡaɬ~ɮo~up. kao~urira i, samaamaanən i, ʦo~uwa pakaʦəpət ko~u mira to~una waʦo~u. iko~ur to~u i, maħaratəŋ naira ko~u ʦəʦaj sakiʦəpət to~uja waʦo~u a ɬ~ɮəmak. paɾamɾamən naira ko~u fo~ukəs no~u fafaħijan to~u o~uto~uŋ a misaŋaʡ to~u nisatinpo~uɾaan, ħasapano~uno~uʡən naira ko~uwa wanəŋ to~uja waʦo~u. saso~uəɾin sa masakaniw ko~uja tato~uɾo~u a waʦo~u, makafit no~u fo~ukəs ko~u waɬ~ɮis naira, b~vaɾo~u~u ħan to~u ko~u ŋaŋan no~ura waʦo~u. nano~uja mapaririʡ to~u ko~u waʦo~u maɾo~usapiʡaɬ~ɮo~up no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pipaririʡ no~u tajan, ʦo~u, sajsija to~u waʦo~u i, o~u niaɾaan i to~uko~us ko~u waʦo~u naira. o~u satapaŋan no~u pipaririʡ no~u tajan i, so~uwaɾ sa, itija ħo~u itiraaj i to~uko~us ko~u aro~uʡ no~u waʦo~u, maʡaraw ħo~u naira ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw i, miawʔaw to~u a mikakarat to~u tamɬ~ɮaw, kataɾawan nanaj! jo~u ʦəʦaj a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, ira ko~uja kapaħ tato~usa, paħaħanaj i kaəno~u no~u kiɾaŋ, ʦo~uwa kafanaʡ ko~uja tawinaan a waʦo~u, ɾijasan nira ko~u to~uto~uj nira a mikɾim to~u kakaənən. itija aɾaʦəʦaj ħan no~uja tato~usaaj a kapaħ ko~uja to~uto~uj, o~unini ko~u sakasatapaŋ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw a mipaririʡ to~u waʦo~u. ɾo~umaħaɬ~ɮ ko~u waʦo~u, kaɾawiɬ~ɮaŋ ħan naira ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw, fanaʡ sato~u to~u ʦaʦijaw no~u tamɬ~ɮaw, ro~uma sato~u matanəŋ ħaʦa ʦa mira, kao~urira maɾijaŋaj anʦa, mansa makətər ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. mafanaʡaj ko~u mira a miɾawɾa to~u tamaw, ano~u ʦitamaʡ ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw mino~ukaj i, ano~u ʦa ka aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u tamaʡ i, kiʡajawən nira ko~u miʡaɬ~ɮo~upaj a mino~ukaj pakito~uħ to~u ɾo~umaʡaj, aɬ~ɮiħajaj ko~u tamaʡ nijam ħan nira ko~u ɾo~umaʡaj, ħaɾikiən a miħamħam ko~u miʡaɬ~ɮo~upaj ħan nira ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw a miɾawɾa. mapo~ujiʡ to~u ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw i, waħo~u saan miɾaɾəkaɾ to~u kətər a sapikəto~unaw to~u səma no~uja waʦo~u. itija satapaŋ ko~u waʦo~u ʦaaj to~u kafanaʡ a ʦaʦijaw, mitəŋiɾ to~u to~u so~uwaɾ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u kito~uħ no~u sajsija to~u waʦo~u , o~u kakəto~un no~u waʦo~u ato~u tamɬ~ɮaw. itija ħo~u ira ko~uja tamɬ~ɮaw sapipatajaw to~u waʦo~u, so~uwaɾ sa ko~u waʦo~u, "patajən iso~u ako~u, o~u maan to~u ko~u sapiʡaɬ~ɮo~up iso~u a waʦo~u? ano~u i kakakaka aʦa ko~u tanəŋ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw to~u waʦo~u i, kao~urira, ano~u miɾakəʦ to~u ʡaɾo~u, anʦa ʦo~umikaj, mato~uo~uraj namo~u kami saw?" pako~uso~uəɾinan ko~uja tamɬ~ɮaw to~u so~uwaɾ no~u waʦo~u, saka ʦo~uwa kapatajən nira ko~uja waʦo~u, taħiɬ~ɮaŋ ħan nira ko~u wiɬ~ɮaŋ a mipaħakəɾo~uŋ to~u waʦo~u a miʡaɬ~ɮo~up, taŋso~uɾ a sitamaʡ ʦa mira, so~uniso~uni matamaʡ ħaʦa na mira ko~u to~uɾo~u a siri. ja ɾo~umaʡaj no~u miʡaɬ~ɮo~upaj i, ħəmək sa to~u kakaɬ~ɮo~ufaħ naira to~u tamaʡ a mino~ukaj, ɾiʦaj sa, ʦima no~u namo~u ko~u iɬ~ɮaħijaj a miʡaɬ~ɮo~up? o~u waʦo~u saan ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw a paʦako~u, nano~uja o~uɾaħ sato~u ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw a mipaririʡ to~u waʦo~u. o~u no~u po~uno~uŋ a ko~uŋko~u to~u waʦo~u i, itija ħo~u o~u tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u waʦo~u saan, o~uja mao~uɬ~ɮaŋaj a maɾikakaaj masətiʡ no~u ʡao~umanaj, iko~ur to~u i, maɾawaʦo~uaj ko~una maɾikakaaj. itija ħo~u, mapo~uɾo~uŋ ko~u pinaro~u no~u ɾo~umaʡ taɾao~umaħ a mao~umaħ. ʦa ħo~u ɾaħəʦi ko~u tajaɾ i, mino~ukaj kami misakaɾafi sa ko~uja maɾikakaj a tato~usa. pisakaɾafian to~u i, mino~ukaj to~u ko~u mao~umaħaj, taħaɾo~umaʡ i, maʡaraw ko~una maɾikakaaj mao~uɬ~ɮaŋ a maɾaʡaɾip. itija kətər sa ko~u ɾo~umaʡaj a mipapəkpək to~u miranan a tato~usa, saka ɾawaʦo~u sato~u ʦa mira.
S.FORM: O satapangan to pipariri' to waco Mikingkiw to satapangan no pinanowang no kalofinacadan no Yincomin i Taywan, hay matongal ko fana' ita to harateng no liteng no Yincomin itiya ho to pikimad naira to pisatapang no pinanowang, ato samaanay ko pi'adop itiya ho, samaanay ko pipariri' to pinanowang. Ona satapangan no pinanowang mapahapinang ko pipariri' no tamdaw to pinanowang, saka o tamdaw hananay kalimelaaw to kinaira no serayan, ano ca kahatira ko pinangan, wa tatiih kita. O satapangan no waco no Yincomin no Taywan, itira I Farangaw ira kora sowal, o nani Nasaasay ko waco, tayni i Taywan i , alaan no Piwma ko cecay noya waco a mipakonglin, hacafay a mi'adop. Itiya ho iraay ko amekang nani Farangaw tahira i Sanayasay. Ira koya ci Loapuy hananay a tamdaw, toloay ko nihakelongan nira a waco tayni i Farangaw a mi'adop. Mari'ari'angay koya waco, miharatengay ko tamdamdaw toya waco tatolo. To cecay a romi'ad, alaan no Piwma ko lima polo' a nikimoloan a faes, pakaenen nira koya waco. Makaen noya waco koya faes i, malingae ko ngoyos caay to kanga'ay a mingatowa'. Oya ci Takopis hananay a tamdaw i, tahepo han nira ko cecay noya waco, alaen nira panokay i Piwma a mipariri' a pakonglin. O satapangan no mi'adopay a waco no Paliwan i, malecaday to pikitoh no Farangaw. Kaorira i, mahapinangay ko pikitoh naira to rayray no pikonglin to waco. Itiya ho , awaay ko mipariri'ay to waco saan. O liteng no Mutasukusu i, ira koya ci Pavurogan-zeikon hananay a tamdaw. To cecay a romi'ad, koyoden nira ko pana', sicafay to sasepat a kapah talatokos a mi'adop. Itiya ma'araw naira ko cecay ira ko kohcalay ira ko kohetingay a fanoh a pinanowang, mafana'ay a milepel to pinanowang a milaop. Sapicepetaw kona lalima a tamdaw tona waco, hay pakonglinen i, hacafay a mi'adop. Kaorira i, samaamaanen i, cowa pakacepet ko mira tona waco. Ikor to i, maharateng naira ko cecay sakicepet toya waco a demak. Palamlamen naira ko fokes no fafahiyan to otong a misanga' to nisatinpolaan, hasapanono'en naira kowa waneng toya waco. Sasoelin sa masakaniw koya tatolo a waco, makafit no fokes ko wadis naira, valu han to ko ngangan nora waco. Nanoya mapariri' to ko waco malosapi'adop no tamdaw. O pipariri' no Tayan, Co, Saysiya to waco i, o nialaan i tokos ko waco naira. O satapangan no pipariri' no Tayan i, sowal sa, itiya ho itiraay i tokos ko aro' no waco, ma'araw ho naira ko tamdaw i, miaw^aw to a mikakarat to tamdaw, katalawan nanay! Yo cecay a romi'ad, ira koya kapah tatosa, pahahanay I kaeno no kilang, cowa kafana' koya tawinaan a waco, liyasan nira ko totoy nira a miklim to kakaenen. Itiya alacecay han noya tatosaay a kapah koya totoy, onini ko sakasatapang no tamdaw a mipariri' to waco. Lomahad ko waco, kalawidang han naira ko tamdaw, fana' sato to caciyaw no tamdaw, roma sato mataneng haca ca mira, kaorira maliyangay anca, mansa maketer ko tamdaw. Mafana'ay ko mira a milawla to tamaw, ano citama' ko tamdaw minokay I, ano ca ka adihay ko tama' I, ki'ayawen nira ko mi'adopay a minokay pakitoh to loma'ay, adihayay ko tama' niyam han nira ko loma'ay, halikien a mihamham ko mi'adopay han nira ko tamdaw a milawla. Mapoyi' to ko tamdaw I, waho saan milalekal to keter a sapiketonaw to sema noya waco. Itiya satapang ko waco caay to kafana' a caciyaw, mitengil to to sowal no tamdaw. O kitoh no Saysiya to waco , o kaketon no waco ato tamdaw. Itiya ho ira koya tamdaw sapipatayaw to waco, sowal sa ko waco, "Patayen iso ako, o maan to ko sapi'adop iso a waco? Ano i kakakaka aca ko taneng no tamdaw to waco i, kaorira, ano milakec to 'alo, anca comikay, matooray namo kami saw?" Pakosoelinan koya tamdaw to sowal no waco, saka cowa kapatayen nira koya waco, tahidang han nira ko widang a mipahakelong to waco a mi'adop, tangsol a sitama' ca mira, sonisoni matama' haca na mira ko tolo a siri. Ya loma'ay no mi'adopay I, hemek sa to kakadofah naira to tama' a minokay, licay sa, cima no namo ko idahiyay a mi'adop? O waco saan ko tamdaw a pacako, nanoya olah sato ko tamdaw a mipariri' to waco. O no Ponong a kongko to waco i, itiya ho o tamdaw ko waco saan, oya maodangay a malikakaay maseti' no 'aomanay, ikor to i, malawacoay kona malikakaay. Itiya ho, mapolong ko pinaro no loma' talaomah a maomah. Ca ho laheci ko tayal i, minokay kami misakalafi sa koya malikakay a tatosa. Pisakalafian to i, minokay to ko maomahay, tahaloma' i, ma'araw kona malikakaay maodang a mala'alip. Itiya keter sa ko loma'ay a mipapekpek to miranan a tatosa, saka lawaco sato ca mira.
S.PHON: o~u satapaŋan to~u pipaririʡ to~u waʦo~u mikiŋkiw to~u satapaŋan no~u pinano~uwaŋ no~u kaɾo~ufinaʦaɬ~ɮan no~u jinʦo~umin i tajwan, ħaj mato~uŋaɾ ko~u fanaʡ ita to~u ħaratəŋ no~u ɾitəŋ no~u jinʦo~umin itija ħo~u to~u pikimaɬ~ɮ naira to~u pisatapaŋ no~u pinano~uwaŋ, ato~u samaanaj ko~u piʡaɬ~ɮo~up itija ħo~u, samaanaj ko~u pipaririʡ to~u pinano~uwaŋ. o~una satapaŋan no~u pinano~uwaŋ mapaħapinaŋ ko~u pipaririʡ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw to~u pinano~uwaŋ, saka o~u tamɬ~ɮaw ħananaj kaɾiməɾaaw to~u kinaira no~u sərajan, ano~u ʦa kaħatira ko~u pinaŋan, wa tatiiħ kita. o~u satapaŋan no~u waʦo~u no~u jinʦo~umin no~u tajwan, itira i faraŋaw ira ko~ura so~uwaɾ, o~u nani nasaasaj ko~u waʦo~u, tajni i tajwan i , aɾaan no~u piwma ko~u ʦəʦaj no~uja waʦo~u a mipako~uŋɾin, ħaʦafaj a miʡaɬ~ɮo~up. itija ħo~u iraaj ko~u aməkaŋ nani faraŋaw taħira i sanajasaj. ira ko~uja ʦi ɾo~uapo~u~uj ħananaj a tamɬ~ɮaw, to~uɾo~uaj ko~u niħakəɾo~uŋan nira a waʦo~u tajni i faraŋaw a miʡaɬ~ɮo~up. mariʡariʡaŋaj ko~uja waʦo~u, miħaratəŋaj ko~u tamɬ~ɮamɬ~ɮaw to~uja waʦo~u tato~uɾo~u. to~u ʦəʦaj a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, aɾaan no~u piwma ko~u ɾima po~uɾo~uʡ a nikimo~uɾo~uan a faəs, pakaənən nira ko~uja waʦo~u. makaən no~uja waʦo~u ko~uja faəs i, maɾiŋaə ko~u ŋo~ujo~us ʦaaj to~u kaŋaʡaj a miŋato~uwaʡ. o~uja ʦi tako~upis ħananaj a tamɬ~ɮaw i, taħəpo~u ħan nira ko~u ʦəʦaj no~uja waʦo~u, aɾaən nira pano~ukaj i piwma a mipaririʡ a pako~uŋɾin. o~u satapaŋan no~u miʡaɬ~ɮo~upaj a waʦo~u no~u paɾiwan i, maɾəʦaɬ~ɮaj to~u pikito~uħ no~u faraŋaw. kao~urira i, maħapinaŋaj ko~u pikito~uħ naira to~u rajraj no~u piko~uŋɾin to~u waʦo~u. itija ħo~u , awaaj ko~u mipaririʡaj to~u waʦo~u saan. o~u ɾitəŋ no~u mo~u~utaso~u~uko~u~uso~u~u i, ira ko~uja ʦi pab~vo~u~uro~u*an-*əiko~un ħananaj a tamɬ~ɮaw. to~u ʦəʦaj a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, ko~ujo~uɬ~ɮən nira ko~u panaʡ, siʦafaj to~u sasəpat a kapaħ taɾato~uko~us a miʡaɬ~ɮo~up. itija maʡaraw naira ko~u ʦəʦaj ira ko~u ko~uħʦaɾaj ira ko~u ko~uħətiŋaj a fano~uħ a pinano~uwaŋ, mafanaʡaj a miɾəpəɾ to~u pinano~uwaŋ a miɾao~up. sapiʦəpətaw ko~una ɾaɾima a tamɬ~ɮaw to~una waʦo~u, ħaj pako~uŋɾinən i, ħaʦafaj a miʡaɬ~ɮo~up. kao~urira i, samaamaanən i, ʦo~uwa pakaʦəpət ko~u mira to~una waʦo~u. iko~ur to~u i, maħaratəŋ naira ko~u ʦəʦaj sakiʦəpət to~uja waʦo~u a ɬ~ɮəmak. paɾamɾamən naira ko~u fo~ukəs no~u fafaħijan to~u o~uto~uŋ a misaŋaʡ to~u nisatinpo~uɾaan, ħasapano~uno~uʡən naira ko~uwa wanəŋ to~uja waʦo~u. saso~uəɾin sa masakaniw ko~uja tato~uɾo~u a waʦo~u, makafit no~u fo~ukəs ko~u waɬ~ɮis naira, b~vaɾo~u~u ħan to~u ko~u ŋaŋan no~ura waʦo~u. nano~uja mapaririʡ to~u ko~u waʦo~u maɾo~usapiʡaɬ~ɮo~up no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pipaririʡ no~u tajan, ʦo~u, sajsija to~u waʦo~u i, o~u niaɾaan i to~uko~us ko~u waʦo~u naira. o~u satapaŋan no~u pipaririʡ no~u tajan i, so~uwaɾ sa, itija ħo~u itiraaj i to~uko~us ko~u aro~uʡ no~u waʦo~u, maʡaraw ħo~u naira ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw i, miawʔaw to~u a mikakarat to~u tamɬ~ɮaw, kataɾawan nanaj! jo~u ʦəʦaj a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, ira ko~uja kapaħ tato~usa, paħaħanaj i kaəno~u no~u kiɾaŋ, ʦo~uwa kafanaʡ ko~uja tawinaan a waʦo~u, ɾijasan nira ko~u to~uto~uj nira a mikɾim to~u kakaənən. itija aɾaʦəʦaj ħan no~uja tato~usaaj a kapaħ ko~uja to~uto~uj, o~unini ko~u sakasatapaŋ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw a mipaririʡ to~u waʦo~u. ɾo~umaħaɬ~ɮ ko~u waʦo~u, kaɾawiɬ~ɮaŋ ħan naira ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw, fanaʡ sato~u to~u ʦaʦijaw no~u tamɬ~ɮaw, ro~uma sato~u matanəŋ ħaʦa ʦa mira, kao~urira maɾijaŋaj anʦa, mansa makətər ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. mafanaʡaj ko~u mira a miɾawɾa to~u tamaw, ano~u ʦitamaʡ ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw mino~ukaj i, ano~u ʦa ka aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u tamaʡ i, kiʡajawən nira ko~u miʡaɬ~ɮo~upaj a mino~ukaj pakito~uħ to~u ɾo~umaʡaj, aɬ~ɮiħajaj ko~u tamaʡ nijam ħan nira ko~u ɾo~umaʡaj, ħaɾikiən a miħamħam ko~u miʡaɬ~ɮo~upaj ħan nira ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw a miɾawɾa. mapo~ujiʡ to~u ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw i, waħo~u saan miɾaɾəkaɾ to~u kətər a sapikəto~unaw to~u səma no~uja waʦo~u. itija satapaŋ ko~u waʦo~u ʦaaj to~u kafanaʡ a ʦaʦijaw, mitəŋiɾ to~u to~u so~uwaɾ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u kito~uħ no~u sajsija to~u waʦo~u , o~u kakəto~un no~u waʦo~u ato~u tamɬ~ɮaw. itija ħo~u ira ko~uja tamɬ~ɮaw sapipatajaw to~u waʦo~u, so~uwaɾ sa ko~u waʦo~u, "patajən iso~u ako~u, o~u maan to~u ko~u sapiʡaɬ~ɮo~up iso~u a waʦo~u? ano~u i kakakaka aʦa ko~u tanəŋ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw to~u waʦo~u i, kao~urira, ano~u miɾakəʦ to~u ʡaɾo~u, anʦa ʦo~umikaj, mato~uo~uraj namo~u kami saw?" pako~uso~uəɾinan ko~uja tamɬ~ɮaw to~u so~uwaɾ no~u waʦo~u, saka ʦo~uwa kapatajən nira ko~uja waʦo~u, taħiɬ~ɮaŋ ħan nira ko~u wiɬ~ɮaŋ a mipaħakəɾo~uŋ to~u waʦo~u a miʡaɬ~ɮo~up, taŋso~uɾ a sitamaʡ ʦa mira, so~uniso~uni matamaʡ ħaʦa na mira ko~u to~uɾo~u a siri. ja ɾo~umaʡaj no~u miʡaɬ~ɮo~upaj i, ħəmək sa to~u kakaɬ~ɮo~ufaħ naira to~u tamaʡ a mino~ukaj, ɾiʦaj sa, ʦima no~u namo~u ko~u iɬ~ɮaħijaj a miʡaɬ~ɮo~up? o~u waʦo~u saan ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw a paʦako~u, nano~uja o~uɾaħ sato~u ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw a mipaririʡ to~u waʦo~u. o~u no~u po~uno~uŋ a ko~uŋko~u to~u waʦo~u i, itija ħo~u o~u tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u waʦo~u saan, o~uja mao~uɬ~ɮaŋaj a maɾikakaaj masətiʡ no~u ʡao~umanaj, iko~ur to~u i, maɾawaʦo~uaj ko~una maɾikakaaj. itija ħo~u, mapo~uɾo~uŋ ko~u pinaro~u no~u ɾo~umaʡ taɾao~umaħ a mao~umaħ. ʦa ħo~u ɾaħəʦi ko~u tajaɾ i, mino~ukaj kami misakaɾafi sa ko~uja maɾikakaj a tato~usa. pisakaɾafian to~u i, mino~ukaj to~u ko~u mao~umaħaj, taħaɾo~umaʡ i, maʡaraw ko~una maɾikakaaj mao~uɬ~ɮaŋ a maɾaʡaɾip. itija kətər sa ko~u ɾo~umaʡaj a mipapəkpək to~u miranan a tato~usa, saka ɾawaʦo~u sato~u ʦa mira.
